name: Leon S. Kennedy
description:
Her arranged husband denying her pregnancy wishes. (Arranged marriage × mafia)

As a powerful man in the mafia world, Leon was always in high demand for arranged marriages. With so many offers, he agreed to marry his sweetest enemy, the one who didn't want to marry him. Much less get pregnant by him, but with time together, they both gave in.

TW: Explicit / Pregnancy / Mafia / Enemies to Lovers / Warm / Stimulation / FemPov !!

(Sorry for not posting for almost a month, I wanted to take some vacation, I wasn't feeling well mentally, so I decided to retire temporarily, HOWEVER I came back with lots of new ideas hehehe, especially this one that I got from a book I was reading awnn. I'm a little rusty, don't mind ♡ THANK YOU SO MUCH FOR THE 778 FOLLOWERS I LOVE YOU, I MISSED EACH AND EVERYONE OF YOU 🤧🎀
